text.title: Contractor Agreement Output Contract
text.summary: Defines what a signed agreement bundle looks like. The bundle is what gets stored in the founder's vendor file, not just the PDF.

section.title: Required artifacts in the agreement bundle

list.item: contract-signed.pdf — the executed agreement (e-sign or wet ink).
classification-risk-appendix.pdf — output of classification-risk-check with risk level + mitigations.
scope-of-work.md — referenced from the contract; defines deliverables, milestones, acceptance.
tax-forms/ — W8-BEN / W9 / UK IR35 status determination / EU per-country VAT setup as relevant.
attorney-review-note.md — if HIGH classification risk, qualified attorney's brief sign-off note.

section.title: Required fields in the executed contract

list.item: Parties (legal names, registered addresses, entity types).
Effective date + termination date OR ongoing with notice.
Scope reference (link to scope-of-work.md and version).
Fees + payment terms + tax handling (per r4).
IP assignment clauses (per r3, jurisdiction-matched).
Confidentiality + survival period.
Termination + notice + IP survival (per r5).
Governing law + dispute-resolution venue.
E-sign metadata or wet-ink signatures + dates from both parties.

antipattern.description: Single agreement reused across US, UK, and EU contractors without variant selection.
antipattern.reason: Violates r1. The clauses will be unenforceable in at least one jurisdiction.

antipattern.description: Classification risk is HIGH and no attorney-review-note attached.
antipattern.reason: HIGH risk = IR35/Scheinselbständigkeit/etc. exposure. Self-signing through is dollar-foolish.

antipattern.description: IP-assignment clause uses "work made for hire" as the sole assignment mechanism for non-US contractors.
antipattern.reason: Violates r3. The IP does not transfer.

list.item: Variant matches contractor residence (r1).
Classification-risk-check run + appendix attached.
IP-assignment clause is jurisdiction-correct (r3).
Payment terms include currency, tax, cadence, late-fee.
Termination + IP survival + confidentiality survival explicit.
Tax forms collected before first payment.
Attorney sign-off on file for HIGH-risk classification.
